mundo.titulo: Two more boys die in latest heatwave water deaths
mundo.resumen: A boy is recovered from a pond in Kent, while another teenager dies in the River Thames in Oxford.

mundo.titulo: Prostate cancer screening only for "a few thousand" high risk men
mundo.resumen: Only men with a dangerous genetic variant and a family history of cancer should be offered screening, say UK advisors.

mundo.titulo: 'I've applied for more than 400 roles' - how young people are facing the job shortage
mundo.resumen: The BBC has been hearing from young people who are struggling to find work about how they are tackling the challenge.

mundo.titulo: An unhealthy focus on sex - Married at First Sight UK insiders on show's 'toxic' culture
mundo.resumen: Fresh revelations come after two women told the BBC they had been raped on the Channel 4 reality show.

mundo.titulo: Iran says it targeted American base after fresh US strikes
mundo.resumen: The hostilities come during a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran, and protracted negotiations to end the three-month war.

mundo.titulo: Man guilty of murdering student with ceremonial knife
mundo.resumen: First-year university student Henry Nowak was killed as he walked back from a night out in Southampton.

negocios.titulo: Ousted BP chairman hits back at 'lies' about his behaviour
negocios.resumen: Albert  Manifold said no-one should be "allowed to hide behind anonymity" when commenting on his time at BP.

negocios.titulo: The £5 coffee that tells a story of global economic turmoil
negocios.resumen: Coffees at some city centre outlets now cost £5. It's a story of tariffs, the climate, Gen Z cultural tastes, and savvy coffee farmers playing the market, writes Faisal Islam

negocios.titulo: Opportunities shrinking for too many young people, says major report on 'lost generation'
negocios.resumen: A report warns the number of 16 to 24-year-olds out of work, education or training set to rise to 1.25 million by 2031.

negocios.titulo: Is 'out of control' US tipping culture spreading overseas?
negocios.resumen: With US waiting staff getting cross at receiving less than 20%, tips are also on the rise elsewhere.

negocios.titulo: EU fines Temu €200m for allowing sale of illegal products
negocios.resumen: The European Commission says the Chinese-owned online retailer failed to take account of risks from baby toys and faulty chargers sold on its platform.

tecnologia.titulo: RSI is the new AGI — and it’s just as hard to pin down
tecnologia.resumen: A new crop of AI labs are focused on recursive self-improvement — but the goal is proving elusive.

tecnologia.titulo: At TechCrunch Disrupt 2026: Databricks’ co-founder on what kills enterprise AI deals
tecnologia.resumen: Enterprise AI is entering a different phase now, one where enterprises are no longer evaluating whether AI is exciting. They are evaluating whether it is safe to deploy broadly.

tecnologia.titulo: YouTube adds new podcast features, including an AI recommendation tool and ‘Auto speed’
tecnologia.resumen: The update signals YouTube's ongoing efforts to compete with other platforms for podcast audiences.

tecnologia.resumen: After overwhelming demand from founders around the world, TechCrunch has extended the Startup Battlefield 200 application deadline to June 8. Nominate a standout startup or apply yours today.

tecnologia.resumen: Savings of up to $410 on TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 tickets end tomorrow, May 29, 11:59 p.m. PT. Register now to save and join 10,000+ tech leaders on October 13-15 in San Francisco.

tecnologia.titulo: CNN sues Perplexity over ‘verbatim’ copycat articles
tecnologia.resumen: CNN has filed a lawsuit against Perplexity, claiming that the startup's AI tools generate "verbatim" copies of its work, as reported earlier by CNN. The lawsuit, filed in a New York court on Thursday, also alleges that Perplexity provides users with information locked behind CNN's subscription. tecnologia.titulo: Qualcomm promises $300 Windows laptops with new Snapdragon C
